h1.visual_description: Centered, italicized serif font at the top of the page, used as a running head for chapter titles.

h2.visual_description: Small caps followed by a numeric identifier, used for figure labels below images.

visual_matchers.pattern: Centered image block with a multi-line caption below it, starting with 'FIGURE' in small caps.
Italicized text within parentheses in captions.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-date style mentioned in captions (e.g., 'Photo by the author')

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Centered italicized text at the top (running head) and Arabic numerals in the top outer corners (page numbers).
